variants.rationale: VERY HIGH viral potential price-reveal format. ENERGETICO persona matches the punchy, fast-paced delivery CUANTO_CUESTA needs. MICRO structure keeps it tight at under 30s — perfect for a single item. Price curiosity is a proven scroll-stopper for furniture finds.

HIGH viral ranking format — the mesa redonda becomes the star item in a Benimaclet/Trinidad zone ranking. REPORTERO delivers measured, factual commentary that fits the evaluative tone. COUNTDOWN structure builds anticipation across items. Medium duration provides narrative space.

HIGH viral minimal-narration format — lets the visuals of Benimaclet/Trinidad speak. OBSERVADOR's calm, reflective style works perfectly with sparse narration and sensory atmosphere. COLD OPEN hits with the mesa redonda reveal immediately. Contrasts sharply with v1 and v2 in pacing, length, and narration level.
